title: Trouble Diagnosis — Self-diagnosis Items (using CONSULT) (Cont'd) — Self diagnosis display chart / Data monitor chart

rows.description: Vehicle speed sensor is not input due to disconnection
Two or more range switches input simultaneously due to a short-circuit in the range switch main unit or signal circuit

rows.trouble: Accelerator switch or accelerator position switch
rows.description: The accelerator switch and accelerator position switch interface is incorrect due to a short-circuit in the switch, a signal short-circuit or disconnection.
Torque signal is not input correctly due to signal short-circuit or disconnection
rows.remarks: ON/OFF signal is output from ECCS C/U when starting

rows.description:
The ABS signal is not input correctly due to a short-circuit in ABS operation signal system or disconnection
Rated voltage is not applied to relay due to a short in idle-up relay output circuit or disconnection
rows.remarks: ON/OFF signal is output from ABS C/U when starting. On models equipped with ABS, turn ignition switch "ON". Turn on CONSULT and touch "START". Start engine N-CVT warning lamp lights and self-diagnosis display indicates that the ABS operation signal path circuit is damaged. In this case however, it is not damaged.

rows.description: Current does not flow correctly to clutch coil due to a short circuit in the output circuit, disconnection or clutch trouble
The rated voltage is not applied to the solenoid due to short in output circuit or disconnection.

rows.remarks: 0 amps is displayed in reverse magnetization mode
0 amps is displayed in reverse magnetization mode
Signal quality is poor below 20 km/h (12 mph)
Accelerator position: approx. 17.5 mm where wire attaches "ON" turns "OFF"
Also displayed in models not equipped with ABS
"OFF" when torque is high (line pressure increases)
"ON" when ABS operates. (Also displayed on models not equipped with ABS)

content_blocks.text: Refers to "CONSULT Operation Manual" for further information.

model_notes: ABS operation signal notes distinguish between models equipped with ABS and those not equipped with ABS. Idle up solenoid also displayed on models not equipped with ABS.
